data.title: ATOM expected to reach $2.10-$2.20 by Jan 2026, with 8-13% upside in 4-6 weeks, backed by bullish indicators.
data.description: Forecasting for ATOM suggests a possible increase of 8-13%, reaching a range of $2.10-$2.20 in the next 4-6 weeks. This prediction is backed by bullish MACD divergence and oversold RSI conditions close to crucial support levels.

data.title: Experiential gifts create stronger emotional connections, study shows. Researchers suggest Christmas gifting takes a new turn.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Los Angeles, a study published in the Journal of Consumer Research highlighted that gift-giving during the holidays has evolved beyond mere physical presents. The research indicates that experiential gifts are more effective in evoking profound emotional reactions and nurturing closer connections between individuals. This research emphasizes the significance of thoughtful experiences over material possessions during the holiday season.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash anticipates hitting $625 in 2 weeks with bullish momentum; possible breakout at $615 resistance level.
data.description: Bitcoin Cash is currently aiming for a price target of $625, with technical indicators suggesting a bullish momentum despite mixed market sentiment. The key resistance level at $615 could potentially lead to a significant breakout in the near future.

data.title: Altcoin ETFs break outflows as Ether stabilizes and XRP gains traction, smaller funds struggle for momentum.
data.description: There is a divergence in flows of Altcoin ETFs, with Ether stabilizing while XRP is experiencing steady demand. Smaller funds are observing uneven traction in the market.

data.title: LINK price could hit $13.50 within 2 weeks, with a 10% potential upside from current $12.29 amid improving technical setup.
data.description: Analysts predict a possible 10% increase to $13.50 for Chainlink, given oversold conditions. Models project a gradual recovery from the current price of $12.29 for LINK.

data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund plans to release financial results and hold investor meetings in 2026 as per schedule.
